name: markdown-notebook-bash-kernel
description: Adds a runnable Bash kernel for markdown-notebook files.

markdownNotebookBashKernel.runInTerminal.description: If true, send cell commands to VS Code integrated terminal instead of capturing output directly into the notebook cell.

markdownNotebookBashKernel.cwdMode.description: Working directory mode: 'workspace' uses the current workspace folder; 'notebook' uses the markdown file folder.

markdownNotebookBashKernel.shellExecutab.description: Executable used for direct execution mode (runInTerminal=false).

markdownNotebookBashKernel.shellArgs.description: Arguments for direct execution mode. Use '{code}' to place cell text explicitly; if omitted, cell text is appended as last argument.

markdownNotebookBashKernel.terminalShell.description: Optional shell executable for integrated terminal mode (for example 'docker'). Leave empty to use VS Code terminal default shell/profile.
Arguments for terminalShellExecutable in integrated terminal mode.
